component.name: MaixVision
component.summary: Programming IDE and graphical block programming tool for Sipeed Maix ecosystem

description.p: MaixVision is a development tool specifically designed for the Sipeed Maix ecosystem. It supports MaixPy (Python) programming and graphical block programming, enabling rapid development of AI vision and audio applications on Maix series edge devices including MaixCAM.

ul.li: MaixPy Python programming with online running and debugging on connected devices
Graphical block programming interface for visual program construction
Real-time image preview that synchronizes with the device display output
Built-in device terminal for SSH access and command-line control
Device file manager for uploading, downloading, and managing on-device files
Application packaging and one-click installation for offline deployment
AI vision development support including object detection, face recognition, OCR, and more
AI audio capabilities including speech recognition, keyword detection, and speech synthesis
Seamless integration with MaixHub online AI training platform

screenshot.caption: MaixVision main interface with code editor and device preview
